message:
fix(security): allocation-size-overflow guard and postMessage origin checks (Fixes #9220) (#9229)

- pkg/api/handlers/github_pipelines.go: add bounds check before
  make([]byte, 0, len(inner)+len(reposJSON)+12) using a named constant
  ghpMaxMergedBodyBytes (100 MB) to prevent go/allocation-size-overflow
  (CodeQL alert #572)
- web/src/lib/cache/worker.ts: add origin guard at the top of
  self.onmessage — rejects messages whose origin does not match
  self.location.origin (js/missing-origin-check, CodeQL alert #200)
- web/public/mockServiceWorker.js: add CodeQL suppression comment with
  justification — MSW verifies senders via self.clients.get(clientId),
  making an explicit origin check redundant and harmful for cross-origin
  iframe support (js/missing-origin-check, CodeQL alert #199)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -508,7 +508,15 @@ func (h *GitHubPipelinesHandler) serveCached(c *fiber.Ctx, key string, build fun
 	reposJSON, _ := json.Marshal(ghpRepos)
 	var body []byte
 	if len(inner) > 2 && inner[0] == '{' {
-		// Merge repos into existing object
+		// Merge repos into existing object.
+		// Guard against integer overflow before computing the allocation size
+		// (go/allocation-size-overflow): both len values come from json.Marshal
+		// on data that originates from a GitHub API response, so they are
+		// bounded in practice, but CodeQL cannot prove that statically.
+		const ghpMaxMergedBodyBytes = 100 * 1024 * 1024 // 100 MB hard cap
+		if len(inner)+len(reposJSON)+12 > ghpMaxMergedBodyBytes {
+			return c.Status(fiber.StatusInternalServerError).JSON(fiber.Map{"error": "response too large"})
+		}
 		body = make([]byte, 0, len(inner)+len(reposJSON)+12)
 		body = append(body, inner[:len(inner)-1]...) // strip trailing }
 		body = append(body, `,"repos":`...)
